revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "â†µ<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst|main|$template-name=webarchive|$flags=override,remove-empty|subst=|$B=<includeonly>{{webarchive|url={{#if:{{{date|}}}|https://web.archive.org/web/{{{date}}}/{{{url|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}}}</includeonly>|url={{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#if:{{{date|}}}|https://web.archive.org/web/{{{date}}}/{{{url|}}}|{{{url|}}}}}|date=}}<noinclude> {{documentation |content= {{subst only|auto=true}} This template should be changed to {{tl|Webarchive}} when it is found in articles. [[Category:Internet Archive templates]]
}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
